title: Fun Time Shape Sorter Ball
features: Complies with UK & EU Safety legislation
description: Product Description Introduce your little one to the wonderful world of shapes with Fun Time's My 1st Shape Sorter! This engaging educational toy is perfectly designed for children aged 12 months and above, featuring big chunky play shapes that are ideal for small hands. The colourful sorter ball comes with multiple shaped openings and corresponding blocks in vibrant hues including yellow, orange, blue, green, red, and purple. As children match shapes to their corresponding holes, they develop essential cognitive skills, hand-eye coordination, and problem-solving abilities. The 'learn as they play' concept makes this toy both entertaining and educational. The chunky, durable construction ensures long-lasting play value, while the rounded edges provide safe exploration for curious toddlers. This shape sorter includes a variety of geometric shapes that help introduce basic mathematical concepts through playful discovery. The two-piece design allows for easy shape retrieval and cleanup, making it practical for both playtime and storage. Safety Warning Please note: The following are not part of the toy & should be removed before being given to a child......plastic/wire ties, rubber bands, plus any other packing materials
